---
title: "Contact"
---

**Ajay Dev**  
Astrophysicist  
International Centre for Radio Astronomy Research  
University of Western Australia

Email: [ajay.dev@research.uwa.edu.au](mailto:ajay.dev@research.uwa.edu.au)

## Online profiles

- [NASA ADS](https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/public-libraries/Kd0naFpJRmOKefCsweQ8kQ)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1655-8178)
- GitHub
#- LinkedIn
